name: APIs.guru / OpenAPI Directory
expected_signal: Public GitHub issue remains open until directory review completes.

interpretation_rules.approval_policy: Never mark approved or listed unless an explicit maintainer or directory confirmation exists.

notes: Do not infer approved/listed from issue closure alone.

name: InterAI GitHub release
expected_signal: Release tag exists and remains available as public beta evidence.
notes: Used as public release evidence for distribution reviewers.
This monitor only checks public release metadata.

name: Arch Tools x402 Directory
blocked_reason: Prior public form attempt returned HTTP 500.
expected_signal: Manual retry or operator contact confirms acceptance, rejection, or a stable submission path.

interpretation_rules.failed_retry_manual: Manual retry required; do not submit automatically.
interpretation_rules.http_500: External form failed, no listing confirmation.

notes: Dashboard must not retry or submit this form automatically.

name: x402.solutions
blocked_reason: Submission requires operator review and consent to project review or possible feature.
expected_signal: Operator explicitly approves terms and submits manually.

interpretation_rules.ready_manual_requires_review_consent: Ready for manual review; no automated submission allowed.

notes: Do not submit without explicit operator consent.

name: FindAPI
expected_signal: Human operator completes captcha-gated form if distribution remains desired.
notes: Dashboard must not bypass captcha or create accounts.

name: x402.eco
blocked_reason: No unambiguous service submission format confirmed.
expected_signal: A documented contribution path, maintainer contact, or repository issue template becomes available.

interpretation_rules.blocked_unclear_submission_path: Do not submit until a clear path exists.

name: MCP Registry
blocked_reason: Distribution should wait for a real MCP server registry package.
expected_signal: Registry-ready MCP server package and confirmed registry submission requirements.

name: A2A directories
blocked_reason: Lower priority while beta distribution stays controlled.
expected_signal: A2A directory criteria become clear and beta scope expands.
notes: Future channel for agent protocol visibility.
No submission should be sent from this dashboard.
